The '''Balmorran defense force''' was the local militia of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Balmorra/Legends|Balmorra]]. During the reign of the reborn [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], the Balmorran militia was made up of [[SD-series battle droid/Legends|SD-series battle droids]], [[X-1 Viper]] Automadon [[Droid/Legends|droid]] walkers, and [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] serving as [[Commander/Legends|commanders]] for advancing battledroids. The defense force was present at the [[Battle of Balmorra]].
